_meta.rule: Compiled BEFORE the first validation run. A hit = a detected episode for the same channel overlapping [date-3, date+3]. Event names appear here as validation targets only; the ex-ante rule bans them from query terms, which is exactly what makes this test meaningful. Events must fall inside the backfill range (2017-01-01 onward). Entries may be appended pre-registration-style (dated, 'added' field) but never removed.
